screener_read.dashboard_summary: Bullish continuation winner supported by strong trend, macro, ADX fit, and strong signed conviction.
screener_read.chart_agreement_note: MT5 D1/H4 structure supports the bullish winner, but current location favors a pullback entry rather than a market chase.

market_state.location_comment: Bullish structure intact, but price sits closer to resistance than to the best immediate pullback support.

why: Winner attribution strongly favors long continuation.
Immediate location is not ideal because resistance is nearby.
A pullback ladder offers much better asymmetry than buying market here.

primary_plan.rr_comment: Blended package improves asymmetry materially versus a market chase.
primary_plan.trailing_plan_note: Base executable package keeps trailing disabled; reconsider trailing only after confirmed H4 breakout above 0.87480.

orderability.allowed_entry_logic: Rest buy limits at 0.86850 and 0.86145 with shared SL 0.86080 and shared TP 0.87470.

backup_plan.trigger_logic: Only if H4 closes above 0.87475 and retest holds above 0.87410; stop-entry above 0.87490.
backup_plan.note: Secondary only; not preferred while price is still under the resistance shelf.

risk_sizing.sizing_note: Uses the risk budget more effectively than the deterministic script while staying inside the margin cap.

legs.trigger: resting order at first tactical pullback support
resting order at deeper structural support

trailing.note: Base executable package keeps trailing disabled.

final_verdict.what_would_invalidate_the_idea: Acceptance below 0.86080 or repeated H4 failure that hardens 0.8741-0.8748 as a ceiling.
final_verdict.what_i_should_do_now: Do not buy market; only place the dip ladder if you want exposure.

notes: Two-leg package uses one shared SL and one shared TP.
This plan intentionally uses a nearer tactical leg plus a deeper structural leg.
Per-leg TP is not modeled here because current bridge constraints still require a shared live TP across the package.
